global_brief: 过去24小时的重要动态主要集中在：OpenAI Previews GPT-5.6 Sol With Restricted Access and Stronger Cyber Safeguards；Lossless, But Not Free: The Lossless, But Not Free — When Speculative Decoding Actually Pays Off (and When It Doesn't)；需求过大供给跟不上，消息称谷歌限制了 Meta 的 Gemini 使用量。
